prompt: Deep dive on META fundamentals, recent price history impact on my position, and allocation recommendation

quant_summary.title: META Position Analysis
quant_summary.summary_text: META shows strong fundamentals with 28% YoY revenue growth. My position is up 18.4% but price history reveals a recent 12% drawdown. Recommendation: hold with 5% trailing stop.

visualizer_pseudo_prompt: Dual-panel chart: top panel shows 3-month price history with volume bars; bottom panel shows position cost basis line vs current price. Annotate key events.
